degree_count: What is the number of nodes whose degree is {query_degree}?
How many labeled nodes are connected to exactly {query_degree} other nodes?
Find all nodes with degree {query_degree}. How many are there?
in_degree_count: Count the nodes with exactly {query_degree} incoming arrows.
What is the number of nodes whose in-degree is {query_degree}?
How many labeled nodes receive {query_degree} directed edges?
Find all nodes with in-degree {query_degree}. How many are there?
out_degree_count: Count the nodes with exactly {query_degree} outgoing arrows.
What is the number of nodes whose out-degree is {query_degree}?
How many labeled nodes send out {query_degree} directed edges?
Find all nodes with out-degree {query_degree}. How many are there?
named_node_degree_value: What is the degree of node {query_label}?
How many other nodes is node {query_label} connected to?
Count the edges incident to node {query_label}. What is its degree?
named_node_in_degree_value: What is the in-degree of node {query_label}?
How many arrows point into node {query_label}?
Count the incoming directed edges for node {query_label}.
How many directed edges end at node {query_label}?
named_node_out_degree_value: What is the out-degree of node {query_label}?
Count the outgoing directed edges from node {query_label}.
How many directed edges start at node {query_label}?
named_node_total_degree_value: What is the total degree of node {query_label}?
How many directed edges touch node {query_label}, counting both incoming and outgoing edges?
Count all arrows incident to node {query_label}. What is its total degree?
How many directed edges either enter or leave node {query_label}?
Find the total number of incoming plus outgoing edges for node {query_label}.
node_color_count: What is the number of labeled nodes whose node color is {target_color_label}?
Find every {target_color_label} node. How many are there?
How many node glyphs use the color {target_color_label}?
edge_color_count: What is the number of graph edges whose edge color is {target_color_label}?
Find every {target_color_label} edge. How many are there?
How many edge segments use the color {target_color_label}?
edge_text_label_count: How many visible edge labels read "{target_edge_label}"?
Count the edge-label boxes that show "{target_edge_label}".
What is the number of edge labels with text "{target_edge_label}"?
Find every edge label that reads "{target_edge_label}". How many are there?
How many edge text labels are exactly "{target_edge_label}"?
cross_color_edge_count: How many edges connect a {source_color_label} node to a {target_color_label} node?
Count the edges whose endpoint nodes are colored {source_color_label} and {target_color_label}.
What is the number of graph edges with one endpoint colored {source_color_label} and the other colored {target_color_label}?
Find every edge between a {source_color_label} node and a {target_color_label} node. How many are there?
How many edge segments join nodes colored {source_color_label} and {target_color_label}?
directed_cross_color_edge_count: How many arrows go from a {source_color_label} node to a {target_color_label} node?
Count the directed edges that start at a {source_color_label} node and end at a {target_color_label} node.
What is the number of arrows whose source node is {source_color_label} and whose target node is {target_color_label}?
Find every arrow from a {source_color_label} node to a {target_color_label} node. How many are there?
How many directed edge segments point from {source_color_label} nodes to {target_color_label} nodes?
isolated_node_count_after_node_removal: If node {query_label} were removed, how many remaining nodes would be isolated?
After removing node {query_label}, how many nodes would have no connections left?
Imagine deleting node {query_label} and every edge touching it. How many remaining nodes would be isolated?
Remove node {query_label} from the graph. How many remaining nodes would have zero incident edges?
If node {query_label} and all of its incident edges disappeared, how many other nodes would be isolated?
undirected_degree_one_filter_remaining_c: If every node with degree 1 were removed, how many nodes would remain?
Remove all nodes connected to exactly one other node. How many nodes are left?
After filtering out the degree-1 nodes, how many labeled nodes remain?
Exclude every node whose degree is 1. What is the number of remaining nodes?
How many nodes would stay in the graph after deleting all nodes with exactly one connection?
directed_in_degree_one_filter_remaining_: If every node with in-degree 1 were removed, how many nodes would remain?
Remove all nodes with exactly one incoming arrow. How many nodes are left?
After filtering out the nodes whose in-degree is 1, how many labeled nodes remain?
Exclude every node that receives exactly one directed edge. What is the number of remaining nodes?
How many nodes would stay in the directed graph after deleting all nodes with exactly one incoming arrow?
directed_out_degree_one_filter_remaining: If every node with out-degree 1 were removed, how many nodes would remain?
Remove all nodes with exactly one outgoing arrow. How many nodes are left?
After filtering out the nodes whose out-degree is 1, how many labeled nodes remain?
Exclude every node that sends exactly one directed edge. What is the number of remaining nodes?
How many nodes would stay in the directed graph after deleting all nodes with exactly one outgoing arrow?
articulation_point_count: How many nodes are articulation points?
How many nodes would disconnect part of the graph if removed?
What is the number of articulation points in the graph?
Find every articulation point. How many are there?
bridge_count: How many edges would disconnect part of the graph if removed?
What is the number of bridges in the graph?
Find every bridge edge. How many are there?
